results.title: Amazon (AMZN) and Competitors Set to Release Q1 Earnings Amid AI Investments
Microsoft vs. Amazon: Comparing Consistent Revenue Growth in Tech Giants
OpenAI's subtle drift from Microsoft has become an aggressive move toward Amazon
Mizuho Raises Amazon Price Target to $325: Is AWS the Real AI Winner of 2026?
Amazon vs. Meta: Which Stock Will Win Over the Next Decade?

summary: Q1 2026: AWS +28% (fastest in 15 quarters), Azure +40%, Google Cloud +63% (from smaller base). AWS holds ~31% global cloud market share. OpenAI aggressively shifting from Microsoft Azure to AWS — Microsoft lost exclusive IP/API cloud deal. Meta signed AWS Graviton5 AI deal worth billions. Big Tech collective capex $725B in 2026 (+77% YoY); Amazon guiding ~$200B. AWS-Anthropic $100B deal for 5GW Trainium capacity through 2036.
